    "(Initial Condition Stage Factor Example)=\n",
    "# Material Initial Condition Stage Factor Script Examples"
   ]

   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8f03602b",

    "papermill": {
     "duration": 0.001308,

   "source": [
    "Download the [ExampleModel.fez](https://github.com/Rocscience/rs2-scripting/blob/main/docs/example_code/example_models/ExampleModel.fez) for this example."
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "efd68734",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-03-19T15:08:54.873037Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-03-19T15:08:54.872774Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-03-19T15:09:05.440884Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-03-19T15:09:05.439412Z"
    },
    "papermill": {
     "duration": 10.572094,
     "end_time": "2026-03-19T15:09:05.442169",
     "exception": false,
     "start_time": "2026-03-19T15:08:54.870075",
     "status": "completed"
    },
    "tags": []
   },
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stdout",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "Unit Weight Factor = 3.0, Porosity Value Factor = 5.0\n"
     ]
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "from rs2.modeler.RS2Modeler import RS2Modeler\n",
    "from rs2.modeler.properties.PropertyEnums import *\n",
    "import os\n",
    "\n",
    "current_dir = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(\"\")) \n",
    "\n",
    "RS2Modeler.startApplication(port=60075)\n",
    "modeler = RS2Modeler(port=60075)\n",
    "model = modeler.openFile(rf\"{current_dir}\\example_models\\ExampleModel.fez\")\n",
    "\n",
    "material = model.getAllMaterialProperties()[0]\n",
    "\n",
    "# Make sure your material stiffness type isn't Custom before changing factor values\n",
    "material.Stiffness.setElasticType(MaterialElasticityTypes.ISOTROPIC)\n",
    "# Make sure to stage Strength and Stiffness Stage Factor option before manipulating any factor properties\n",
    "material.StageFactors.setStageStrengthStiffnessStageFactors(True)\n",
    "\n",
    "definedStageFactors = material.StageFactors.getDefinedStageFactors()\n",
    "newStageFactor = material.StageFactors.createStageFactor(2)\n",
    "definedStageFactors[2] = newStageFactor\n",
    "material.StageFactors.setDefinedStageFactors(definedStageFactors)\n",
    "\n",
    "initialConditionStage2Factor = material.InitialConditions.stageFactorInterface.getDefinedStageFactors()[2]\n",
    "\n",
    "initialConditionStage2Factor.setUnitWeightFactor(3)\n",
    "initialConditionStage2Factor.setPorosityValueFactor(5)\n",
    "\n",
    "print(f\"Unit Weight Factor = {initialConditionStage2Factor.getUnitWeightFactor()}, Porosity Value Factor = {initialConditionStage2Factor.getPorosityValueFactor()}\")\n",
    "\n",
    "model.close()\n",
    "\n",
    "modeler.closeProgram()"
   ]
  }
 ],
